titleStmt.title: SII 7.142: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 142. (A.R. No. 129 of 1900). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaccelviyu n=ta nakke Urimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷak kān=ta ḷuṟcālai kalamaṟuttu veṅkaināṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyu n=ta ṭiyaivaḻiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai puka
ḻtara Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamu n=ti ṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu tanṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiuḷ Ellā yāṇṭu n=to ḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakecarivanma rāna śrīrājarājade vaṟku
yāṇṭu 2 10 3Āvatu milāṭāna jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmade yam Attanamponnūrccaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhai yiṭai vāṇakappāṭip peṇṇai vaṭakarai brahmadeyam maṇalūr paruṭaiyāruḷ kaucikan Aṇṇāvan
tiruvikkiraman vilaikoṇṭa nilam viḷant Aikkolāl Irunūṟṟaimpattāṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Orumāvāka vilaikoṇṭa nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum koṇṭu vilaidravya- mum Iṟaidravya muṅ kaiyile Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭuttom
Attanamponnūr sabhai yom Aṇṇāvan tiruvikkiramanukku Inni lattukku nir vilaikkūliyum collappeṟātomānom sabhai yom brahmadeya nti rukkovalūr tiruviṭaikaḻiāḻvārkku Iṉṉilam Eḻumāvaraiyum Iṟaiyili vilaiko
ṇṭu kuṭutta nilam Ittevar tevatānam ciñciliveliyoṭuṅ kiḻakkaṭaiya Eḻumāvaraiyuṅ koṇṭu Ellaikkal naṭṭukkuṭutten Aṇṇāvaṉ tiruvikkiramaneṉ Innilaṅ koṇṭu Istā nattu vaikānasarom ceyvitāna nivan=ta m Uttaramayana
mum dekṣiṇa mayanamum tirumañcaṇam kaḻañce Eḻumañcāṭiyum (kaḻañce Eḻumañcāṭiyum) ponner Iraṇṭu tirumañcaṇamuñ ceytu Ipponnil tirumañcaṇamtoṟum Eṇṇāḻikkālālk kalakkala Arici Amutuceyvittu neyyamutu Irunāḻiyuṅ kaṟiamutu Āṟum
tayiramutu patakkum Aṭaikkāyamutu nūṟum veṟṟilai nālu paṟṟum puḷiṅkaṟi Amutukku puḷi Aimpalamum caṟkkarai Aimpalamum kaṭuku Uḻakkum miḷaku Āḻakkum kalacam nūṟṟeṭṭum sna manadravya ṅkaḷ Aṉaiccum kalacattiṉ kiḻaṭṭu nellu 1kalamum
viṟakum Āṟṟi nīrum Ācāriyapūcaṉaiyum puṭavai nālum sna manattukku veṇṭuvana Ellāṅ kuṟaivaṟuttu Innilaṅ koṇṭu ceyyakkaṭavom stā nattu vaikānasa rom ..
Digital edition of SII 7.142 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
